text_excerpt: Work in Parliament - Fabian Hamilton MP Skip to main content About Contact Work in Parliament Supporting Leeds North East More Menu Work in Parliament Below you can find details of Fabian’s work on behalf of North East Leeds residents in Parliament. This includes written questions, oral questions, speeches in the House of Commons and more.
